title: CEO 지시 원장
summary: 루카스 지시사항을 재기동 후에도 유지되는 실행 원장으로 관리합니다.

observed_patterns: command-center/server/routes/meetings.ts: 미팅 채널, 참여자, 메시지 유형, 첨부, 인코딩 검증
command-center/frontend/src/services/meeting-api.ts: 메시지/제안/결정/액션 항목 타입과 미팅 클라이언트 헬퍼
command-center/server/services/task-queue.ts: 대기 작업을 유휴 작업자에게 배정하는 루프와 배정 로그
canvas-hub/server.ts: 미팅 맥락과 작업 산출물을 연결하는 캔버스 구조
distilled_advantages: 터미널 스크롤백에 의존하지 않고 지시사항을 영속 원장으로 분리한다
미팅을 작업 채널로 취급하고 메시지/제안/결정/액션 항목을 구분한다
각 지시마다 담당자, 상태, 증거, 막힌 점을 명시한다
작업 산출물과 미팅 맥락을 연결해 결정사항이 흩어지지 않게 한다
한글 지시가 깨지지 않도록 UTF-8 기준으로 저장한다

directives.last_update: Terminal-only emergency mode: kept active by strict Lucas order at 2026-06-02T13:13:24.594Z.
updates: Problem: terminal cards remain unstable, previews can be garbled or partial, and input/scrollback evidence is not yet reliable.
Root cause hypothesis: durable audit log and UI replay/preview buffer are not separated enough; tail-only display is a weak optimization.
Required change: bounded UI replay ring/window, explicit log retention/rotation, and no full-history read/ship on normal refresh.
9001 restart is allowed if required, but PID before/after and context-risk note must be recorded.
Max report: developer-1 bounded replay audit, developer-2 full-history read/ship/retention audit, developer-3 ledger visibility, developer-4 QA/CDP evidence.
developer-4 restored active on 9001 without restarting PID 4516; policy/QA prompt sent.
developer-3: 9100 ledger visibility fields added for 15-minute P0-zeroth reports; no 9001 restart.
P0-0 screen issue promoted: URL query filter/team can override the left session group after refresh; user expects selected group/layout/session to persist across reload.

PASS: apps/web/src/main.tsx URL replaceState persistence for view/filter/layout/session; apps/web test 25/25; build passed with chunk-size warning only; CDP refresh evidence consoleErrors=0 pageErrors=0.
directives.title: Terminal stability first: bounded replay buffer and log retention
directives.directive: P0-0 now: fix terminal screen state persistence before other product work. Selected left group, layout, and session must survive refresh by keeping URL/local storage in sync.
directives.next_action: Max keeps monitoring for any residual screen-state regression; terminal durability/replay retention remains the next terminal-stability workstream.
directives.evidence_required: Regression watch only: screenshots and console check if the refresh persistence issue reappears.

report_fields.problem: P0-0 screen issue: when the URL still contains filter=development-team, choosing a different left session group and refreshing returns to Development Team.
report_fields.root_cause: readStoredTerminalFilter prioritizes URL query filter/team, but sidebar filter changes only updated React state/localStorage and left the URL stale.
report_fields.action: Patch shell URL-state sync so filter, layout, selected session, and view update the address bar as operator state changes.
report_fields.doing_now: P0-0 screen refresh persistence patch is applied and verified; monitoring for residual regressions.
report_fields.next: Continue terminal stability zeroth work on durable log/replay retention; reopen screen refresh persistence only if regression is observed.
report_fields.blocker: None identified. Expected scope is 9000 web hot reload/restart only; 9001 restart not required.
report_fields.evidence: apps/web/src/main.tsx URL replaceState persistence; data/work-ledger.json work-event-1780304461677; npm --prefix apps/web test 25/25; npm --prefix apps/web run build pass with chunk-size warning only; CDP screenshots data/system-logs/p0-screen-refresh-persistence-9000-cdp/p0-screen-refresh-persistence-desktop.png and p0-screen-refresh-persistence-mobile.png; 9001 PID 4516 preserved.
report_fields.report_cadence: 15 min: item / problem / root_cause / action / doing_now / next / blocker / evidence
